sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: ALAB Q4/FY2025: 분기·연간 최고 매출 동시 경신, 연간 매출 전년比 115% 성장

keyPoints.text: 4분기 매출 2억 7,060만 달러로 분기 최고치를 경신했으며, 전분기 대비 17%, 전년 동기 대비 92% 증가했다. 연간 매출 8억 5,250만 달러는 전년 대비 115% 성장한 기록이다.
연간 기준 GAAP 순이익 2억 1,910만 달러, Non-GAAP 순이익 3억 3,100만 달러를 달성하며 창업 이래 최대 수익성을 기록했다.
Scorpio X-Series 양산 램프가 시작됐으며, 2030년 200억 달러 규모로 예상되는 merchant scale-up 스위칭 시장을 겨냥한 투자를 가속화한다고 밝혔다.

businessChanges.text: Scorpio X-Series 스마트 패브릭 스위치 양산 램프를 리드 플랫폼에서 시작했으며, 하이퍼스케일러 고객과 협력해 증가된 radix, 플랫폼 특화 프로토콜, 인네트워크 컴퓨팅, Hypercast 기술, 광커넥티비티를 지원하는 로드맵을 확장했다.
이스라엘에 새 설계 센터를 개설하며 R&D 투자를 가속화했고, PCIe 6, 광커넥티비티 등 다수 제품 라인과 폼팩터에 걸친 시장 기회를 확대하고 있다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 GAAP 매출총이익률 75.6%, GAAP 영업이익 6,700만 달러를 기록했다.
4분기 Non-GAAP 영업이익 1억 890만 달러(영업이익률 40.2%), Non-GAAP 순이익 1억 480만 달러, Non-GAAP 희석 EPS 0.58달러를 달성했다.
연간 Non-GAAP 영업이익 3억 3,440만 달러(영업이익률 39.2%), Non-GAAP 순이익 3억 3,100만 달러, Non-GAAP 희석 EPS 1.84달러를 기록했다.

watchItems.text: Scorpio X-Series 양산 램프 속도와 하이퍼스케일러 초기 플랫폼 배포 실적이 2026년 성장 가시성을 좌우할 핵심 지표다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 q425exhibit991.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 IR CONTACT: Leslie Green leslie.green@asteralabs.com Astera Labs Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results • Record quarterly revenue of $270.6 million, up 17% QoQ, and record full-year revenue of $852.5 million, up 115% year-over-year • Broadening Scorpio X-Series smart fabric roadmap to address expanding scale-up market opportunities supporting multiple customers, starting production ramp for lead platform SAN JOSE, CA, U.S. – February 10, 2026 – Astera Labs, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALAB), a leader in semiconductor-based connectivity solutions for rack-scale AI infrastructure, today announced preliminary financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year of 2025, ended December 31, 2025. “Astera Labs delivered strong financial results in Q4 with revenue growing by 17% sequentially  Normalized numeric aliases: $270.6 million = 2억 7,060만 달러; $852.5 million = 8억 5,250만 달러; $270.6 = 270.6달러; $852.5 = 852.5달러.

million, highlighting a stellar 2025 with full-year revenue growth of 115% year-over-year,” said Jitendra Mohan, Astera Labs’ Chief Executive Officer. “The market opportunity for our Intelligent Connectivity Platform continues to grow rapidly, encompassing multiple product lines, physical media, form factors, and protocols for standard and custom applications. Considering the strong customer momentum and revenue opportunities, Astera Labs is accelerating R&D investment, including opening a new design center in Israel to further capitalize on this high-growth market opportunity.” Fourth Quarter of Fiscal 2025 Financial Highlights GAAP Financial Results: • Revenue of $270.6 million, up 17% sequentially and up 92% year-over-year • GAAP gross margin of 75.6% • GAAP operating income of $67.0 million • GAAP operating margin of  Normalized numeric aliases: $270.6 million = 2억 7,060만 달러; $67.0 million = 6,700만 달러; $45.0 million = 4,500만 달러; $270.6 = 270.6달러; $67.0 = 67.0달러; $45.0 = 45.0달러.

per share of $0.25 Non-GAAP Financial Results (excluding the impact of stock-based compensation expense, acquisition-related costs, and the income tax effects of non-GAAP adjustments): • Non-GAAP gross margin of 75.7% • Non-GAAP operating income of $108.9 million • Non-GAAP operating margin of 40.2% • Non-GAAP net income of $104.8 million • Non-GAAP pro forma diluted earnings per share of $0.58 Full Year Fiscal 2025 Financial Highlights GAAP Financial Results: • Revenue of $852.5 million, up 115% year-over-year • GAAP gross margin of 75.7% • GAAP operating income of $173.4 million • GAAP operating margin of 20.3% • GAAP net income of $219.1 million • GAAP diluted net  Normalized numeric aliases: $108.9 million = 1억 890만 달러; $104.8 million = 1억 480만 달러; $852.5 million = 8억 5,250만 달러; $173.4 million = 1억 7,340만 달러; $219.1 million = 2억 1,910만 달러; $0.25 = 0.25달러; $108.9 = 108.9달러; $104.8 = 104.8달러; $852.5 = 852.5달러; $0.58 = 0.58달러; $173.4 = 173.4달러; $219.1 = 219.1달러; $1.22 = 1.22달러.

of 75.8% • Non-GAAP operating income of $334.4 million • Non-GAAP operating margin of 39.2% • Non-GAAP net income of $331.0 million • Non-GAAP pro forma diluted earnings per share of $1.84 Q4 2025 and Recent Business Highlights • Started production ramp of Scorpio X-Series solutions for lead platform and expanded the Scorpio X-Series Smart Fabric Switch roadmap in collaboration with hyperscaler customers to support next-generation scale-up networking applications. Scorpio X-Series roadmap now includes new features that will support increased radix, platform-specific protocols, in-network computing, Hypercast technology, and optical connectivity. Initial customer momentum and early platform deployments support an acceleration of investment to target the large and growing merchant scale-up switching marketplace,  Normalized numeric aliases: $334.4 million = 3억 3,440만 달러; $331.0 million = 3억 3,100만 달러; $20 billion = 200억 달러; $334.4 = 334.4달러; $331.0 = 331.0달러; $1.84 = 1.84달러; $20 = 20달러.
